term_id.description: The unique identifier for the term.

definition.description: The exact definition of the term.

authority_sources.description: ADRs or canonical sources that define this term.

allowed_phrases.description: Acceptable aliases or phrases referencing this term.

forbidden_interpretations.description: Negative examples or contexts where this term does not apply.

required_evidence.description: Validation artifacts or signals required to prove this term is active.

classifier_task_kind.description: The expected action categorization, e.g., validation, generation, extraction.

ambiguity_action.description: Fallback action required immediately if meaning or intent is ambiguous.
